		flags: immutable range
		values: 0 4294967295
		value: 4096
	53 AMD_CRTC_REGAMMA_TF:
		flags: enum
		enums: Default=0 Identity=4 sRGB inv_EOTF=8 BT.709 OETF=9 PQ inv_EOTF=10 Gamma 2.2 inv_EOTF=11 Gamma 2.4 inv_EOTF=12 Gamma 2.6 inv_EOTF=13
		value: 0

id	crtc	fb	CRTC x,y	x,y	gamma size	possible crtcs

	8 type:
		flags: immutable enum
